listings.title: iPhone 14 PRO 128gb WATER DAMAGED
listings.body: Not working iPhone 14 Pro. As you can see in the video, it turns on but water damage has left the phone inoperable. Still a little water visible in the camera lenses too. Disconnected from iCloud, this phone would be ready to activate if repaired. I’ll meet the buyer in front of Stop and Shop at 154 Westchester Ave. Thanks for looking!

listings.title: Takamine 12 string Acoustic/ Electric
listings.body: Model EG523C-12 Jumbo * Jumbo body gives huge projection and rich chorus-like 12-string shimmer * Solid spruce top helps it open up nicely over time * Flamed maple back/sides keep the tone bright and articulate * TK40 preamp is considered very gig-friendly * Slim Takamine neck profile makes it easier than many 12-strings to play * Cutaway is useful if you play higher up the neck
